image:image.image:title: Scam flow evidence map, version one
image:image.image:caption: Evidence-map poster showing a reported flow from Telegram contact to fake Solana bundler or bot service, server access, suspected backdoor, wallet drain, split wallets, and cash out.

image:image.image:title: Scam flow evidence map, version two
image:image.image:caption: Second evidence-map poster showing the reported Soldrift / devbeast5775 flow with trust contact, tool delivery, backdoor access, wallet-drain risk, split wallets, and cash-out routing.

image:image.image:title: Scam funnel diagram
image:image.image:caption: Diagram showing trust, wallet access, server access, private key exposure, and bot payment entering a funnel that leads to backdoor, phishing-tool, wallet-drainer, and cash-out risk.

image:image.image:title: Wanted-style 100 SOL scam alert poster
image:image.image:caption: Wanted-style community alert poster describing a reported Soldrift / devbeast5775 scam warning with 100 SOL and 100,000 USD risk language.

image:image.image:title: Fake developer shop warning poster
image:image.image:caption: Poster showing a fake crypto developer shop theme with Solana bundler, HFT bot service, hidden backroom, backdoor code, phishing tool, and wallet-drainer risk references.

image:image.image:title: Fake support operation phishing warning
image:image.image:caption: Poster showing a fake support operation theme with recovery-service bait, wallet connect approval, OTP verification, burner-line style contact risk, and phishing-warning indicators tied to Soldrift.

image:image.image:title: Wallet-drainer phishing alert poster

image:image.image:title: Phishing warning investigation poster

image:image.image:title: QR code trap room warning poster
image:image.image:caption: Poster showing a QR-code trap room, fake wallet connect prompts, approve-drain warnings, and scam-route indicators linked to Soldrift / devbeast5775.

image:image.image:title: Solana drain factory detailed flowchart
image:image.image:caption: Detailed Solana drain factory infographic showing connect, approve, drain, split, swap, exchange, and cash-out stages with fraud, backdoor, phishing-tool, and wallet-drainer labels.

image:image.image:title: Solana drain factory scam infographic
image:image.image:caption: Cartoon-style Solana drain factory infographic showing scam, fraud, wallet-drainer, phishing-tool, fake dApp approval, and Solana HFT bot scam warning labels.

image:image.image:title: Solana drain pipeline phishing-tool diagram
image:image.image:caption: Clean pipeline diagram showing victim wallet, fake tool or dApp, backdoor access, drain funds, split wallets, exchange cash out, and scam or phishing warning stages.

image:image.image:title: Victim wallet autopsy backdoor diagram
image:image.image:caption: Victim wallet autopsy diagram showing connect wallet, approve permission, hidden backdoor, drain SOL, split funds, and cash-out route as a wallet-drain warning model.
